comment.body:
Great call Alma on the mean reversion. Congrats to anyone who played fast and furious with puts. Also I think might bounce here and patience is the better approach since this was also written. Small sizing on the puts I guess.

"For me, this means increasing weight towards downside hedges, but I wouldn’t size up until 6307.32 is confirmed to be broken. OpEx will not let it fall but tomorrow I will update the positioning."
